blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not deterministically induce a real suggestAxes action failure through the live UI. Taking the browser offline left the Convex request pending until connectivity returned, so the retryable friendly-error branch could not be exercised without mocking or altering backend behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: test-cli so future user-testing rounds can map targeted Vitest output to contract assertions like VAL-AXGEN-013 through VAL-AXGEN-015.

executionNotes: Task-based user-testing-flow-validator subagents could not be launched because the inherited model identifier custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16 was rejected as invalid, so the primary validator executed the planned web flows and test-cli checks manually and wrote the flow reports itself.
